title: Fast and simple video download library and CLI tool written in Go
summary: This repo understands multi-platform video downloading at scale — 40+ supported sites with per-site extractors, per-site CI workflows, and a clean plugin architecture in Go.  It's the broadest video download tool in the T27 analysis series, expanding scope beyond YouTube to TikTok, Instagram, Bilibili, Reddit, Vimeo, Twitter/X, and 30+ more.
creator_view: This repo understands multi-platform video downloading at scale — 40+ supported sites with per-site extractors, per-site CI workflows, and a clean plugin architecture in Go. It's the broadest video download tool in the T27 analysis series, expanding scope beyond YouTube to TikTok, Instagram, Bilibili, Reddit, Vimeo, Twitter/X, and 30+ more. For T27, this represents the 'download video for Whisper' path when neither transcripts nor captions are available — especially on non-YouTube platforms. The per-site extractor architecture (extractors/<site>/<site>.go) is the gold standard for multi-platform content extraction plugins.

repo.description: Fast and simple video download library and CLI tool written in Go

QS-05_cicd.detail: 2,865 CI runs. 46 per-site test workflows + CI + goreleaser + builder. Exceptional.

QS-10_community_health.detail: 71/100. Has CONTRIBUTING.md, issue templates. Missing code of conduct, security.
